title: Anti Auto Clicker
description: Anti Auto Clicker - Captcha-based verification for catching sophisticated auto clickers that bypass traditional anti-cheats. Designed for servers where players use automation tools that mimic human behavior.
body:
**AntiAutoClicker** detects automated clicking tools like KillAura by analyzing player attack patterns in real-time. When suspicious behavior is detected, players must complete a simple GUI captcha — drag a glowing item to a chest — to prove they're human.

[Showcase Video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vTdPiuXoquQ)

🔍 Smart Detection

Monitors attack rate, timing consistency, and cooldown precision
KillAura bots attack with machine-like consistency — humans don't
Configurable suspicion thresholds to reduce false positives

🎯 GUI Captcha System

Interactive inventory challenge: find and drag the redstone to the chest
Detects cheating (attacking or moving with the GUI open = instant ban)
2-minute timeout with sound and title alerts

⚖️ Tiered Punishments

1st fail: Kick
2nd fail: 1-hour tempban
3rd fail: 24-hour ban
4th+ fail: Permanent ban
Fully customizable — run any commands per tier

💾 Persistent Storage
SQLite (default) or MySQL — failure counts persist across restarts.

📣 Discord Integration
Webhook reports with player info, attack stats, and suspicion scores.

📋 Commands

/aac reload — Reload config
/aac captcha <player> — Force captcha
/aac stats <player> — View attack stats
/aac reset <player> — Clear data
/aac list — Show monitored players
/aac test webhook — Test Discord

📋 Permissions

antiautoclick.admin	    Access to all admin commands (/aac)
antiautoclick.bypass	Bypass captcha checks entirely
antiautoclick.notify	Receive staff notifications when players fail captcha

_Requirements: Paper 1.21+ • Java 21+_

_Tested on Paper 1.21.10 & Folia 1.21.8_
